Home / Service Areas / Glenview

Kitchen-remodel in Glenview, IL

Trusted local professionals serving Glenview and surrounding communities

Serving Glenview, IL

Onyx Kitchen Remodel transforms kitchens in Glenview's diverse housing stock, from post-WWII ranches to modern luxury homes. We prioritize durable materials that handle the area's heavy snowfall and freezing temperatures. Our designs enhance Glenview's upscale suburban aesthetic, whether you're renovating a 1960s split-level or a new construction. Local homeowners appreciate our attention to detail and ability to create kitchens that stand up to Midwest winters while looking stunning year-round.

Glenview offers diverse housing from post-WWII to modern builds and faces harsh winters with heavy snow and ice.

Kitchen-remodel Services in Glenview

Custom Cabinetry

Handcrafted storage solutions designed for Chicago's unique homes.

Quartz Countertops

Durable surfaces engineered for Chicago's extreme temperature swings.

Technology integrations that respect Chicago's architectural heritage.

Learn more →

Historic Kitchen Restoration

Preserving Chicago's architectural legacy one kitchen at a time.

Learn more →

Universal Design Kitchens

Accessible layouts for Chicago's aging housing stock.

Learn more →
